sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na sumte kawhkholna hiam kidawm in,
Lam hong pi ding khat kisam tei tei.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ciampello Zeisu sin in, Siatna pan itna honglak
Nitang in huihnung taleh, Ciampello Zeisu sin in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na nite gualnopna tawh kidim in,
Tua zawhteh dahna khuamial in tuam a,
Khuamial vengsak ding kisam teh nang.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lungzuangin nangkia lam napai lai tak,
Guallelhna vive tawh ki dim in,
Lungkia in lungsim tamkham dek lai tak,
Tuihual daisak pa kisam teh nang.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hun leh nite meng meng in bei veh,
Zongin thumin tauin na om lai tak,
Na mawhna sawp ding mi kisam teh nang.
